name: Ongoing support
tagline: Your software and automations always in good shape, without you worrying.

packages.name: Care
packages.hook: Your software always running, without you worrying.
packages.problem: I take care of keeping everything fast, secure and up to date while you focus on your business.
deliverables: Monitoring to get ahead of problems
packages.outcome: Peace of mind, with no surprises or downtime.

packages.name: Managed Flows
packages.hook: Your automations, always in good shape.
packages.problem: Automations need maintenance when your tools change. I watch over them and adjust them for you.
deliverables: Continuous monitoring of your flows and integrations
Adjustments when your tools or processes change
A report of what your business is saving
packages.outcome: Everything keeps running on its own, month after month.

faq.a: Bug fixing, small improvements every month and monitoring to get ahead of problems.

faq.q: Do you also maintain the automations?
faq.a: Yes, I watch your flows and integrations and adjust them when your tools change.
